text: Ashley, are you going to be home for dinner tonight? I was thinking about ordering something so I don't have to cook.
Go ahead and order a pizza. Pepperoni is fine with me. I should be home by six.
Good. I ordered from Guido's. Should arrive around 6:30. What do you want to watch tonight?
Dad, are you and Mom still on for Sunday dinner this week? James wants to know if he should bring anything.
Yes, we are expecting you all. Your mother is cooking chicken. Tell James to just bring himself and the children. She needs a headcount by noon on Sunday.
Perfect. All four of us will be there. Malik is excited. We will see you Sunday, Dad.
Dad, are you cooking this Sunday or should I pick something up on the way over?
Your mother is making roast chicken. Come around six and bring Keisha and the children. She would enjoy seeing the little ones.
We will be there, Dad. Keisha is looking forward to it. We will bring the kids.
Hey Ashley. Just checking in. How is your week going?
Not bad, James. Had a good shift at the food bank this morning. Forty-eight families served. How are things with you and Denise?
Busy but good. Kids are a handful but healthy. We will see you Sunday, Ashley. Denise is looking forward to it.
Hi Dad Rogers. Just wanted to check in. How are you and Dorothy doing?
We are doing well, Keisha. Thank you for asking. Dorothy's knee has been a little stiff but she is managing. How are the children?
They are doing great. Marcus Jr. lost another tooth. We will bring them Sunday so Dorothy can see how big they are getting.
Hey Ashley. Greg here. Haven't talked in a while. How is everything going up your way?
Doing well, Greg. Had a long week at the food bank but it is good work. Dorothy sends her regards. How are Terri and the children?
Everyone is well. Terri works too hard but she is happy. The kids keep asking when they can come see Grandpa Ashley. We will try to make Sunday dinner next week.
Pick up milk and cornmeal on your way home.
Got the milk and cornmeal. Home by six.
Dad, I set your clinic reminder for the 15th.
Thank you, I have it written down too.
Pop, the kids want to come for Sunday dinner.
Bring them all, plenty of food.
Driving up Sunday with Nyla and Jayden.
Drive safe. We'll have dinner ready.
Did you take your lisinopril this morning?
Took it with my coffee, don't worry.
Malik ran a personal best today!
That boy can run. Tell him I'm proud.
Checked the brokerage, we're up a little.
Good. Add a little to the grandkids' fund.
Greg says hi, he'll help with the yard.
Tell Greg I've got iced tea waiting.
The girls are coming Sunday, so plan for a big pot.
I'll set out the big pot tonight.
Can you watch the Ring camera for a package this afternoon?
I'll watch the camera, go on to work.
Zoe lost her first tooth, she's so proud.
Tell Zoe grandpa's proud of that tooth.
The FedEx package should arrive Tuesday.
I'll track it on UPS for you.
Sit down and rest those knees a while.
I rested. Knees are fine after the ibuprofen.
Aaliyah made honor roll again.
That's my girl. Good for Aaliyah.
I'll bring the grill charcoal Saturday.
Appreciate it, the bag's near empty.
Nyla drew you a picture of the roses.
I'll put it right on the refrigerator.
Denise called, Malik's meet moved to Saturday.
Tell Denise Saturday works, I'll drive.
I'll come by after work to check the phone settings.
Come whenever, the coffee's on.
Coinbase question when you have a minute.
Ask me Sunday, we'll go slow through it.
Long week at the school, but we're good.
Take care of yourself, you work too hard.
Bring the good tablecloth up from the basement.
Tablecloth is on the table already.
Sending photos from Aaliyah's recital.
Got the photos, she was beautiful up there.
Elijah said 'grandpa' clear as day today.
That'll make an old man's whole week.
How was the walk this morning?
Good walk. Cold but clear.
Track championship is March 13, can you drive?
I'll drive. Confirm the carpool for me.
Don't forget Clarence's birthday card.
Card is bought and signed.
Mom's cake is ordered for her birthday.
Good. Your mother will be pleased.
Rheumatologist moved my appointment to Thursday.
I'll drive you Thursday, no trouble.
Did OpenClaw remind you about Bible study?
It did. I'm already at the church.
We're low on coffee again.
I'll pick up coffee at Meijer.
Fine looking picture. Love, Grandpa. (Jan 06)
That's a good one. Thank you. (Jan 07)
Proud of you. (Jan 08)
Look at that smile. (Jan 09)
Keep up the good work. (Jan 10)
